story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: The art of Mediterranean cuisine since 1985
story.paragraph1: Nestled in the heart of Algiers, Le Jardin Restaurant is more than just a dining establishment. It is an invitation to travel, a celebration of Mediterranean flavors that have shaped our childhood and inspired our cuisine.
story.paragraph2: Founded by the Benali family, our establishment carries on a culinary tradition passed down through generations. Each dish tells a story — of our land, our local producers, and our unwavering passion for the art of fine dining.
story.paragraph3: In a setting where modernity meets tradition, we invite you to experience a unique sensory journey, where every bite is a voyage through the Mediterranean.

chef.title: Our Chef
chef.subtitle: A passion, a vision, a signature
chef.name: Chef Karim Benali
chef.bio: Trained alongside the greatest Mediterranean chefs, Karim Benali has traveled across the Mediterranean basin in search of authentic flavors. From Marseille to Beirut, through Barcelona and Tangier, he has captured the essence of each culinary culture to create a unique signature that has made Le Jardin famous.
chef.philosophy: "Cooking is the art of transforming simple ingredients into extraordinary moments."

dishes.title: Signature Dishes
dishes.subtitle: The chef's emblematic creations
dishes.dish1_desc: Slow-cooked lamb with tender apricots, slivered almonds and a blend of Eastern spices
dishes.dish2_desc: Traditional seafood fish soup with saffron and homemade rouille
dishes.dish3_desc: Breton lobster grilled with candied citrus butter and seasonal vegetables

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A gastronomic journey through the Mediterranean
menu.app1_desc: Grilled bread with olive oil, sun-dried tomatoes, fresh basil and creamy burrata
menu.app2_desc: Thinly sliced scallops marinated in lime, sea salt and caviar
menu.app3_desc: Chickpea cream with black truffle, extra virgin olive oil and crispy pita bread
menu.main1_desc: Roasted sea bass fillet, sun vegetables, Kalamata olives and pistou
menu.main2_desc: Fine semolina, braised lamb, roasted chicken, merguez sausages, vegetables and fragrant broth
menu.main3_desc: Creamy risotto with porcini and chanterelle mushrooms, aged parmesan and shaved truffle
menu.dessert1_desc: Revisited tiramisu with Sicilian pistachio, fresh raspberries and meringue shards
menu.dessert2_desc: Crispy phyllo dough, caramelized walnuts, orange blossom honey and orange flower ice cream
menu.drink1_desc: Premium green tea, fresh mint and cane sugar
menu.drink2_desc: Fresh lemon, elderflower syrup and sparkling water

reservation.title: Book Your Table
reservation.subtitle: Experience an unforgettable culinary journey
reservation.description: Whether for a romantic dinner, a business lunch or a family celebration, our team will be delighted to welcome you and offer you an exceptional moment.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Their experience speaks for itself
testimonials.test1_text: An exceptional culinary experience! The setting is beautiful, the service impeccable, and every dish is a work of art. The Lamb Tagine is simply divine.
testimonials.test2_text: Le Jardin is without doubt the best Mediterranean restaurant in Algiers. The Royal Bouillabaisse transported me straight to the Marseille coast.
testimonials.test3_text: The atmosphere is warm and elegant. The staff is attentive and knows the menu perfectly. A true culinary gem.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here for you
